reconciliation.horizontal: The original physically-correct cue was not reliably readable. After strengthening the complete-head horizontal translation and rotation, three fresh focused reviewers unanimously matched the hidden physical axis.
reconciliation.vertical: The unchanged vertical control passes rendered-axis measurement and focused review; the final panel assignment is independently randomized.
reconciliation.integrity: All three post-repair focused reviewers found eyes, head ornaments, and hair clean.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: increased horizontal head translation magnitude 2 to 3 and rotation magnitude 4 to 6
